hero.subtitle: MyanCare makes warm, scheduled phone calls to your elderly parents in Myanmar — no smartphone, no internet, just a friendly voice on the phone they already have.
hero.note: For families working in Japan, Singapore, Thailand and beyond

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1Text: Sign up and record a short voice note for your parent, so our first call arrives with your voice.
howItWorks.step2Text: Our trained caller phones your parent on the schedule you choose — a friendly chat on any GSM phone.
howItWorks.step3Text: After each call, you receive a wellness update so you always know how Mom and Dad are doing.

pricing.title: Simple pricing
pricing.feature1: Scheduled calls to your parent — you pick the days
pricing.feature2: Your recorded voice note, delivered with care
pricing.feature3: A wellness update after every call
pricing.feature4: Works on any GSM phone — no apps, no internet

auth.signupIntro: A few details and you're ready to set up caring calls.

dashboard.subtitle: Here's how things are going back home.

voice.title: Voice note for the next call
voice.intro: Record a short message — our caller will play it to your parent at the start of the call.
voice.micError: We couldn't access your microphone. You can upload an audio file instead.
voice.saved: ✓ Saved — it will play on the next call.
voice.toast: Voice note saved — it will play on the next call.
